benefits.description: Zero burn during injection and after mixing BPC-157 and TB-500 with NAD+ and GHK-Cu. Complete elimination of injection pain.

side_effects.description: Significant burning pain from NAD+ injections lasting hours, exacerbated with GHK-Cu

protocol_notes: Uses GLOW protocol (BPC-157 and TB-500 combination). Mixed 500mcg total (250mcg BPC + 250mcg TB-500) into 300mg NAD+ to eliminate injection pain. Also eliminates pain from GHK-Cu injections. Uses multi-peptide calculator for dosing. Injects 20 units of final blend containing approximately 1670mcg GHK-Cu per dose across 15 total doses. Takes 2-3 zinc supplements per week at 30mg each. Least sensitive injection site is upper thigh between outside and front area.
